entries.title: agent-webbridge
entries.description: Clean-room, open-source (MIT) browser automation for AI agents. Drives the user's real Chrome with its live login sessions across multiple Chrome profiles in parallel — and, unlike typical browser bridges that share one global current tab, attaches chrome.debugger per tab so N tabs in one profile run concurrently. No closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.

entries.title: harness
entries.description: Personal Claude Code harness — pipeline orchestration, specialized agents, and engineering-discipline hooks.

entries.title: clinpub
entries.description: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entries.title: cc-native
entries.description: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entries.title: carta-cc
entries.description: Maps, connects, and remembers your documentation. Structural scanning, LLM semantic audit, Qdrant embedding, and semantic search.

entries.title: volcengine
entries.description: Skills for Volcengine (火山引擎) scenarios: cloud resource operations (ECS/VPC/VKE/CLB/RDS/Redis/TOS), deployment, IaC, and SDK code generation.

entries.title: monskills
entries.description: Skills for developing apps on Monad. Assists LLM with frontend, smart contract deployment, and deploying to production

entries.title: silver-bullet
entries.description: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entries.title: dominicode-sdd-creator
entries.description: Spec-Driven Development, adaptación de Dominicode — genera spec.md + plan.md + tasks.md (TDD) antes de escribir código.

entries.title: ywc-agent-toolkit
entries.description: YWC skill distribution toolkit for Claude Code — 26 skills covering planning, commits, PR creation, spec writing, code review, security audit, and development workflows

entries.title: visualcave
entries.description: Generate interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files. Powered by Mermaid.js. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, class diagrams, state machines, timelines, mind maps, git graphs, pie charts, and quadrant charts. Dark mode, step-through reveal, and export built in.

entries.title: ironlabs
entries.description: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entries.title: chaos-substrate
entries.description: Persistent code knowledge memory with MCP tools for indexing, querying, feature context, change-plan decomposition over a layered feature hierarchy, feature explanation pages, and client-facing interactive feature guides (Access-Control-style scrollytelling with real-UI previews and an end mini-game).

entries.title: agents
entries.description: Specialist sub-agents for AI-assisted development.

entries.title: factory
entries.description: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

entries.title: local-issue
entries.description: Local docs/issue/ tracker as a set of low-cost-model sub-commands (write/list/read/update/migrate). Keeps issue CRUD, index maintenance, and VCS commit out of the main session context.

entries.title: truto
entries.description: Official plugin for Truto -- the unified API platform. Helps developers integrate with third-party tools using Truto's APIs.

entries.title: usap-skills
entries.description: Unified Security Agent Platform — 79 cybersecurity skills + 12 cs-* orchestrator agents that emit a typed 11-field JSON output contract, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. Runs in any LLM. Bundles 7 slash commands (usap:run, usap:fortigate, usap:orchestrate, usap:challenge, usap:compare, usap:test, usap:README) and 6 user-invocable orchestrator skills (Alex, CISO, DevSecOps, Incident Responder, Program Manager, Red Team).

entries.title: ai-devkit
entries.description: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entries.title: recall
entries.description: Durable, fully-local project memory for Claude Code. Logs every session to .recall/history.md and condenses it into .recall/context.md with a local Python summarizer (TF-IDF + TextRank) — no API key, no external model, nothing leaves your machine. New sessions resume from the saved context.

entries.title: apple-photos
entries.description: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, and export originals or edited photos (macOS only)

entries.title: dream
entries.description: Memory consolidation for Claude Code. Simulates the Auto Dream feature by auditing, deduplicating, and rebuilding your memory files.

entries.title: github-release
entries.description: Generate categorized release notes for any GitHub repo and optionally publish them as a GitHub Release. Conventional-commit aware, monorepo-friendly, with a hard publish-confirmation gate.

entries.title: zeromind
entries.description: ZeroMind MCP plugin: ZeroMind content discovery (zeromind.search/inspect/install/engage — find, reuse, review, and vote on published worlds + assets) plus world list/create/launch/connect and engine tools (execute, guides, capture, VFS, bash) routed to the WASM engine in your browser. Bundled skills teach Claude to check ZeroMind first and drive Zero worlds. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ — if you see 'status failed', install Node from https://nodejs.org and restart Claude Code.

entries.title: cowork-plugin-management
entries.description: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers, adjust plugin behavior, and adapt templates to match how your team works.

entries.title: exa
entries.description: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entries.title: sig
entries.description: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entries.title: agentic-council
entries.description: Convene 20 agentic specialists on your hardest engineering problems. Distinct perspectives, unified design, actionable plans, every decision tracked. Ships sibling councils for finance, people, and revenue under their own slash commands.

entries.title: loop-engineer
entries.description: Loop engineering wizard for Claude Code. Answer 3 questions and Claude orchestrates a maker/verifier agent loop until your goal is met.

entries.title: edator
entries.description: Record once. Claude makes the edit decisions, FFmpeg executes them. An AI co-producer that cuts your raw footage into a finished video — deterministically.

entries.title: codevista
entries.description: Local, zero-runtime-dependency visual plans and recaps. The agent writes a compact Markdown-superset file; a bundled Node server renders it as a rich, interactive, commentable view in the browser — entirely on 127.0.0.1, no MCP, no network.

entries.title: design-system
entries.description: The @efounders design-system toolbox skills: assess a project (ds-audit), set up its design system (ds-bootstrap), and sync Figma from the code (ds-figma). Companion to the design-skills plugin.

entries.title: image2editable
entries.description: Convert images, screenshots, and design drafts into editable PPTX presentations or layered PSD files.

entries.title: rladies-skills
entries.description: A composing suite of Agent Skills distilling the R-Ladies guide (guide.rladies.org) into on-demand guidance for the community and global team: apply the R-Ladies brand and voice, write and translate blog posts, draft and schedule social media, coordinate abstract review, run chapters and events, and maintain the website the R-Ladies way.

entries.title: greenfield
entries.description: Build and customize a production-ready agent workflow from scratch, or audit and upgrade your existing projects.

entries.title: saas-development
entries.description: Stack-aware skills and hooks for FastAPI + Next.js SaaS projects deployed to Railway

entries.title: umans-vision-handoff
entries.description: Adds a view_image tool that hands images to a native-vision Umans model (Kimi first, then fallbacks) for providers like GLM 5.2 whose vision is via-handoff only.

entries.title: forger
entries.description: Dezessete skills de Claude Code (PT-BR) que levam o dev solo da ideia ao deploy E melhoram projetos que já existem: onboarding guiado (start, stack, design, setup, roadmap, next, status, ops), auditoria de projeto existente (audit) + fila .forge/BACKLOG.md, avanço-automático gated (loop) e o ciclo de engenharia (context, brainstorm, plan, coding, fix, ship) + help. Projeto novo? /dev-start. Já existe? /dev-audit. Depois é só 'executa o passo 0X'.

entries.title: riskified
entries.description: Riskified developer tools for Claude Code — automates beacon fraud-detection integration into merchant storefronts

entries.description: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer: beads issue tracking, oracle-discipline gates, TDD enforcement, and outcome-bias continuation for Claude Code sessions.

entries.title: salvage
entries.description: Start over, simpler — recover the real requirements from a project that went down a bad path and emit a portable spec to rebuild on the simplest maintainable stack.

entries.title: manifest-it
entries.description: Ergonomic-fix grab bag for the Claude Code substrate. Bundles: (1) vision bridge — text-only models auto-describe images instead of dead-ending on 'model does not support vision'; (2) image-gen bridge — routes image generation to gpt-image-2; (3) ForceLink — Stop hook that blocks turns ending with bare file paths, forcing clickable URLs; (4) a sanitized, distilled operating-ethos CLAUDE.md (a16z/Garry Tan hybrid). A shipping manifest of small substrate fixes.

entries.title: js-mastery-teacher
entries.description: A Socratic JavaScript teaching system with specialist agents (JS Mentor, Async Wizard, Code Reviewer, Test Engineer, Junior Mentor), practice skills, slash commands, and guided learning tools. Based on the JavaScript Mastery roadmap.

entries.title: agent-kevin
entries.description: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entries.title: forward-deployed-selling
entries.description: Operating doctrine for AI-era enterprise sales. Use when an agent works on accounts, deals, outreach, coaching, or pipeline — any revenue-affecting decision.

entries.title: design-skills

Plus /execute-task, a gated task-lifecycle playbook (requires superpowers + cc-codex-triage).

This plugin gives agents the full InsForge surface: database CRUD with RLS, authentication, storage, edge functions, AI, realtime, Stripe payments, and deployments. Includes CLI infrastructure management, debugging diagnostics, and integration guides for third-party auth providers (Auth0, Clerk, Kinde, Stytch, WorkOS).

A PM triages each request and routes it through specialist roles (architect, dev, tester, reviewer, debugger, security, docs, release), tracking everything in a feature tracker + todo list, and enforcing the coding standards you enable.

entries.title: account-transaction
entries.description: Portfolio.AccountTransaction tools on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) parse the export/API feed and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements with live asset/account/lock resolution. Plus batch fixers: duplicate-trade-reconcile (removes restated/double-loaded trades against Portfolio.CustodyPosition, lock-aware) and compromissada-fix (normalises XP repos onto the cash-like convention, pair-consistent and lock-gated).

entries.description: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entries.title: javascript-typescript
entries.description: JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks

entries.title: gsd-core
entries.description: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entries.title: greennode-agentbase
entries.description: Full GreenNode AgentBase lifecycle: scaffold → configure → deploy → monitor → teardown. 10 skills including /agentbase-wizard, /agentbase-deploy, /agentbase-monitor.

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: sealos
entries.description: Deploy local or GitHub projects to Sealos Cloud, connect cloud databases and S3 object storage, generate Dockerfiles and Sealos templates, assess cloud-native readiness, and build Sealos Desktop apps.

entries.title: code-quality-atlas
entries.description: A research-derived suite of 33 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entries.title: open-skills
entries.description: 开放技能库：工作流、性能优化、Jira、Git 等 Claude Code Skills

entries.title: shippo
entries.description: Ship packages with Shippo. Multi-carrier rate shopping, label generation, package tracking, address validation, customs declarations, and batch processing from CSV files.

entries.title: visual-planner
entries.description: Browser-reviewable, iterable planning for Claude Code and Codex. Generate a plan as a local markdown file, review it in a polished browser UI, leave comments, and iterate revision-by-revision with visual diffs.

entries.title: devkit
entries.description: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entries.title: claude-code-statusline
entries.description: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entries.title: iterm2-tab-status
entries.description: Show iTerm2 tab status (running/idle/attention) for Claude Code sessions

entries.title: data-liberation
entries.description: Extract content from closed web platforms (GoDaddy Websites & Marketing, Hostinger, HubSpot, Shopify, Squarespace, Webflow, Weebly, Wix) into WordPress-compatible WXR files. Inspect, extract, QA, and import to WordPress.

entries.title: svaha
entries.description: Claude Code that picks up exactly where it left off — frozen cross-session handoffs, a self-watching context budget, coherence guardrails, and an optional operator decision layer.

entries.title: goldfish
entries.description: Cross-client MCP memory with checkpoints, recall, briefs, and standups for AI-assisted development

entries.title: rapid-sustainability-risk
entries.description: Rapid Sustainability Risk Assessment (RSRA / Aris) — embed energy transition and decarbonization analysis directly into real estate acquisition underwriting. Produces a phased Decarb Plan, Energy & Emissions Profile, Deal Signal, and targeted Seller Questions from any OM, PCA, or ESG DD report.

entries.title: korean-dart
entries.description: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entries.title: piflow
entries.description: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entries.title: writing
entries.description: Opinionated writing skills for Obsidian, tuned for cryptography and mathematics

entries.title: teacher-operating-system
entries.description: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.

entries.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entries.description: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entries.title: whitebox-testing
entries.description: White-box testing skill with path coverage, cyclomatic complexity, decision-path analysis, dataflow path coverage, and test generation for Python/JS/Java/C.

entries.title: skill-governance-archive
entries.description: Archived 2026-04-27. Point-in-time experiment in Claude skill governance. See README for lessons learned and recommended replacements (Cisco skill-scanner, plugin distribution, Anthropic enterprise controls).

entries.title: Titan
entries.description: Pensar, fazer e passar o bastão: cinco skills chamáveis individualmente. planejar (metodologia completa pra desenhar produto/software novo do zero antes de codar), auto-think (modo largar-e-esquecer pra ESTUDAR um problema difícil — pesquisa, estuda de vários ângulos, confronta os achados com o Codex, verifica e entrega uma ou mais soluções com veredito; não executa), auto-worker (modo largar-e-esquecer em que o Claude EXECUTA a tarefa e o Codex confronta o trabalho antes de fechar, com protocolo de segurança e verificação embutido), handoff (gera documento de passagem de bastão pra continuar o trabalho numa sessão nova do zero) e gpt-optimizer (revisor adversarial on-demand via Codex GPT-5.5 que te faz refletir sobre uma decisão no meio da conversa — o GPT tenta derrubar, advogado do diabo; sem precisar de plano, PR ou código formal; quando o veredito é Seguir, oferece executar com a auto-worker). A auto-think estuda e recomenda; quem executa a solução escolhida é a auto-worker. A planejar pode, no fim, oferecer disparar a auto-worker pra executar o plano — opcional, nunca automático. Repo-agnóstico — serve pra qualquer projeto.

entries.title: codeforge
entries.description: + CFP-2412 (2026-06-25) — whitelist↔manifest↔templates 3-way 일관성 CI gate 신설 (Epic CFP-2394 Story D, 최종): consumer-applicability 삼각 일관성(whitelist 28 ↔ templates/github-workflows/ ↔ manifest 49 closure) warning-tier CI gate. 방향1(whitelist→templates 실존 전수 miss=FAIL) + 방향2(manifest dep→whitelist subset) + 방향3(whitelist→manifest closure-asset 등재완전성, AM-3 run:-block-aware 추출) + depth-2(hard-exit 데이터 dep). graceful=data-absence 스크립트 EXIT 0(path-filter/on.paths skip 금지=required Pending trap 회피) + setup-error fail-closed exit 2. check_whitelist_manifest_3way.py Python SSOT(ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(injection-safe pull_request) + 15 fixture discriminating test(mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry 77→78 + label-registry-v2 v2.98→v2.99(hotfix-bypass:whitelist-manifest-3way 99 member). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-130 §결정3 closure ENFORCEMENT 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.36.0 → 6.37.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2408 (2026-06-25) — consumer-applicability full closure manifest 등록 (Epic CFP-2394 Story B): consumer-applicable workflow 의 full closure(scripts+데이터+정책doc)를 templates/consumer-scripts.manifest 에 등록(16→49 entry, additions-only). Check 4 확장자-인지 면제(.tsv 데이터/.mjs import-only ESM 의 exec-bit 면제 + 이중확장 .sh.tsv 류 strict 우선 방어) + 22 script git index mode +x normalize + 6 fixture mutation-kill. ADR-130 closure-완전성 규칙(§결정5-A 채널=templates/github-workflows) 적용. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.35.0 → 6.36.0 MINOR (consumer 33 script 추가 배포 + Check 4 면제 runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2383 (2026-06-20) — spawn-prompt-fact-verify 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 37 §결정 1 layer 1 sub-scope 1-Z, sub-scope 1-L CFP-1590 carrier): worker→worker handoff spawn prompt PR-body-proxy 안 C1-C5 fact category (C1 counter / C2 version / C3 SHA / C4 verify-result / C5 file-existence) inherit fact 단언 시 동일-window [verified-via:] annotation presence lint (warning-tier). 4 sub-source inherit fact (사용자 발화 / sibling Issue body / sister PR commit message / 별 carrier retro file). 삭제된 1-W source (c84fadf3) C1-C5 PATTERNS 이식 + S2 (CFP-2382) issue-body-claim-pre-screen 구조 답습 (line-by-line in_fence toggle + strip_inline_code + PER_BLOCK_SCAN_CAP=50 + ANNOTATION_MARKER 정적 substring + exit 0=PASS/1=FLAG/2=SETUP) + PR-event trigger (pull_request opened/synchronize/reopened, tier-downgrade-guard.yml 선례 답습 — carrier workflow = spawn-prompt-fact-verify.yml). check_spawn_prompt_fact_verify.py Python SSOT (ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex, nested quantifier 0) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow + self-contained discriminating test. injection-safe (pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read,pull-requests:read / env-injection only — run inline 보간 금지, fork-PR shell injection 차단). PR-body-proxy 한계 명시 (실 spawn prompt 아닌 proxy, transcribe 케이스만 검출) → warning-tier advisory (위조 false-PASS 구조적 가능, 보안 통제 신뢰 금지). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변) + label-registry-v2 v2.98 MINOR (hotfix-bypass:spawn-prompt-fact-verify 115번째 family member, 1-W name 충돌 회피). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.33.0 → 6.34.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2382 (2026-06-20) — issue-body-claim-pre-screen 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 20 §결정 15, CFP-1559 carrier): orchestrator-authored followup Issue body 안 4 sub-pattern (PR state / CFP state / count / sister carrier) stale-claim 을 동일-line [verified-via:] annotation presence 로 write-time pre-screen (warning-tier). Wave 1 declarative anchor(CFP-1559)의 Wave 2 wire. check_issue_body_claim_pre_screen.py Python SSOT (line-by-line in_fence toggle masking + inline code-span strip — fenced 내부 빈줄 fragmentation 0, ReDoS-safe anchored regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow (on:issues opened/edited, R1 scope predicate = codeforge-improvement AND (type:improvement OR title [CFP-FU/[CFP][FU), story-init.yml 답습) + self-contained discriminating test (23 TC, mutation 생존 0). count enum 한글 확장 (건/개/곳/줄/회/어휘 — ordinal-모호 번/항목/차례 제외, FP 보수) + 구조화 FLAG message (pattern/line/claim/hint). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.32.0 → 6.33.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2381 (2026-06-20) — deferred-followup reconcile 게이트 (ADR-060 Amendment 18 §결정 32): §결정 19 auto_blocking 라벨의 mechanical forcing function 신설. '임계 초과 + auto_blocking + 전용 carrier 부재' evidence-checks-registry entry 자동 검출 + 강제 action 3택 (배선/강등/폐기, warning-tier). carrier-부재 = detect_command OR workflow 경로 파일 ABSENT (닫힌집합 + fail-loud 경로추출, status-agnostic broad criterion, 2-root parity). self-validation test job (다형 fixture mutation 생존 0) + STALE 2 status flip (bootstrap-labels-precondition + schema-change-7-principles-self-check) + 16번째 registry self-entry. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.31.0 → 6.32.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2377 (2026-06-20) — 완료 단계 정식화 (ADR-128 + ADR-040 Amd9 + ADR-045 Amd13): merge 직후 wrap-up 을 정식 '완료 단계' 로 격상. (갭 A) backstop GC 자동 트리거 복원 = hooks.json SessionEnd async dispatch 단일 wire (hooks/session-end → check-worktree-stale.sh background GC, 문서-실배선 drift 복원 — SessionStart async 무시·동기 지연 회귀라 배제, 트리거 단일화 invariant = Stop 동시 wire 금지) + phase:완료 worktree-clean self-check 신규 (scripts/check-worktree-completion-clean.sh, eager 미실행 검출 게이트, F2 sub-worktree vs Story root mergedAt 구분 계약, fail-safe 4종 상속, warning-tier + workflow:null local-only — required CI 불가). (갭 B) 4-트리거 (post-merge-followup / retro-mandatory / GitOpsAgent eager / phase:완료) 수렴 SSOT = playbook §9.7.2 명문화 (신규 SSOT 0, 클라우드↔로컬 비대칭 = 절차+텔레메트리 조합). (갭 C) Living Architecture / Confluence mirror 재정합 = 유예 (ADR-112/111 owner pointer). 신규 lane 0 / required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-024 Amd19 §B 정합) / process-skip 채널 0 (ADR-127 ratchet 정합). 6.30.0 → 6.31.0 MINOR (SessionEnd hook 신규 + 완료-게이트 기능). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). Claude Code 범용 SW 개발 오케스트레이션 플러그인. 0 core 에이전트 (wrapper-only) · 8 레인 + CI gate + role:dev 동적 roster 로 요구사항 접수부터 배포 리뷰 통과까지 자율 실행

entries.title: knowledge-skills
entries.description: Autonomous knowledge management skills for keeping AI context files up to date

entries.title: claude-workflow
entries.description: Workflow enforcement for Claude Code skills. Adds a Stop hook that blocks session completion until all defined workflow steps are finished.

entries.title: agent-factory
entries.description: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entries.title: posthog
entries.description: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from your AI coding tool. Optionally capture Claude Code sessions to PostHog LLM Analytics.

entries.title: pi-stuff
entries.description: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: wire
entries.description: The Wire Framework — AI-accelerated data platform delivery for the full lifecycle: requirements, design, development, testing, deployment, enablement

entries.title: bench
entries.description: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entries.title: pragmatic-dev-toolkit
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for the flat & pragmatic development workflow — workflow skills for alignment, execution and diagnosis; YAGNI/QA/security/doc/design reviewers; stack-aware test scaffolder (Python today); self-gated hooks; configurable path contract via CLAUDE.md.

entries.title: obsidian
entries.description: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commit context, auto-save sessions via background claude CLI summarizer, export conversations, create/retrieve notes, and auto-organize content.

entries.title: exarchos
entries.description: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entries.title: apple-mail
entries.description: Manage Apple Mail through natural language - read, search, send, and organize emails (macOS only)

entries.title: win-customers
entries.description: Understand buyers, package value, create demand, and sell. Validate ICP, Grand Slam Offer, $100M Leads, Breakthrough Advertising, Conversation-First Outreach, Challenger Sale, JOLT Effect, and Key Person of Influence help win customers end-to-end.

entries.title: project-init
entries.description: Interview-based project scaffolding for Claude Code — generates CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP, .gitignore, and .env.example from decisions, not templates.

entries.title: setup
entries.description: Claude Code infrastructure and agent team setup — rules, hooks, memory system, routing, and agent installation in one guided flow.

entries.title: session-checkpoint
entries.description: Session closer — saves context before compact. Handoff file, memory updates, lesson extraction, reflexion (what went wrong, what to improve).

entries.title: project-check
entries.description: Scan existing project across 4 dimensions: Infrastructure, Security, Quality, Harness. Returns scored gaps ordered by severity.

entries.title: session-start
entries.description: Session opener — loads handoff from last session, reviews lessons learned, runs health check, outputs ready signal with priority action.

entries.title: scope
entries.description: Define what is IN, what is OUT, and exit criteria before implementation. Quick mode (3 questions) or Full mode (layered spec with ADR).

entries.title: pre-push
entries.description: Mandatory pre-push pipeline — secrets scan (12 patterns), build/test gate, lint, parallel AI code review. Blocks push on Critical/High findings.

entries.title: freeze
entries.description: Declare the editable zone — everything outside is frozen. Prevents scope creep during implementation by locking untouched files.

entries.title: code-autopsy
entries.description: 12Q quantified code review — 4-axis scoring (Security/Stability/Robustness/Operability), severity anchors, deployment verdict, factuality gate. Works as standalone prompt in any LLM

entries.title: goal-lock
entries.description: Agent discipline engine — locks the goal, enforces PLAN-DO-VERIFY-FINALIZE-OUTPUT loop, detects 11 success masquerading patterns.

entries.title: collab-audit
entries.description: 13-section AI collaboration audit — analyzes actual work patterns (not surveys) to generate behavioral profile, blind spots, and growth direction.
